Title: SMK-001: User Registration (Personal)
Steps:
1. Navigate to registration page
2. Select Personal account type
3. Fill all required fields
4. Submit registration
Expected Result: Account created successfully, user redirected to confirmation

Title: SMK-002: User Registration (Organization)
Steps:
1. Navigate to registration page
2. Select Organization account type
3. Fill all required fields including company details
4. Submit registration

Title: SMK-003: Sign In (Personal)
Steps:
1. Navigate to sign-in page
2. Enter valid credentials
3. Click Sign In
Expected Result: User logged in, redirected to dashboard

Title: SMK-004: Sign In (Organization)
Steps:
1. Navigate to sign-in page
2. Enter valid organization user credentials
3. Click Sign In
Expected Result: User logged in with organization context

Title: SMK-005: Catalog Browsing
Steps:
1. Navigate to catalog
2. Click on category
3. Verify products display

Title: SMK-006: Product Search
Steps:
1. Enter search term in search bar
2. Press Enter or click search

Title: SMK-007: Add to Cart
Steps:
1. Navigate to product page
2. Click Add to Cart
3. Verify cart updated
Expected Result: Product added to cart, cart count incremented

Title: SMK-008: Cart Operations
Steps:
1. Navigate to cart
2. Verify items display
3. Update quantity
4. Verify total updates

Title: SMK-009: Checkout - Delivery
Steps:
1. Select Delivery option
2. Enter shipping address
3. Select payment method
4. Complete order

Title: SMK-010: Checkout - Pickup (BOPIS)
Preconditions: Products in cart, pickup locations configured
Steps:
1. Select Pickup option
2. Select pickup location from map
3. Confirm selection
4. Complete checkout

Title: SMK-011: Payment Processing
Steps:
1. Select Bank card payment
2. Enter test card details
3. Submit payment

Title: SMK-012: Order Confirmation
Steps:
1. Verify confirmation page displays
2. Verify order number shown
3. Verify order in history

Title: BOPIS-001: Map Stability
Preconditions: Cart has products, pickup locations configured
Steps:
1. Open pickup location modal
2. Enter search term
3. Clear search
4. Repeat 3 times
Expected Result: Map maintains consistent dimensions, no jumping

Title: BOPIS-002: Desktop Location Selection
Steps:
1. Open pickup modal
2. Click location in list
3. Verify map pans to location
4. Click Select in info window
5. Confirm selection

Title: BOPIS-003: Mobile List/Map Toggle
Steps:
1. Open pickup modal
2. Verify List view default
3. Click Map toggle
4. Verify map displays
5. Click List toggle
6. Complete selection
Expected Result: Toggle works, both views function correctly

Title: BOPIS-004: Search Functionality
Steps:
1. Enter partial location name
2. Verify results filter
3. Clear search
4. Enter invalid address
5. Verify error handling
Expected Result: Search filters correctly, graceful error handling

Title: BOPIS-005: Map Interactions
Steps:
1. Click marker A
2. Verify info window opens
3. Click marker B quickly
4. Verify only one info window visible
Expected Result: No race conditions, single info window

Title: BOPIS-006: Pickup Location Card
Steps:
1. Select location
2. Verify card displays
3. Verify all info present
4. Click Cancel, verify return
5. Reselect, click Confirm
Expected Result: Card shows all details, actions work

Title: BOPIS-007: Pickup Filters (City/State)
Steps:
1. Open pickup modal
2. Apply city filter
3. Verify results
4. Apply state filter
5. Verify combined results
Expected Result: Filters work correctly individually and combined

Title: PAY-001: CyberSource Valid Submission
Steps:
1. Select Bank card (CyberSource)
2. Enter valid card: 4622943127013705
3. Enter name, expiry 09/2029, CVV 838
4. Submit order

Title: PAY-002: Empty Cardholder Name
Steps:
1. Fill card number, expiry, CVV
2. Leave cardholder name empty
3. Submit order

Title: PAY-003: Invalid Card Number
Steps:
1. Enter invalid card: 1234567890123456
2. Fill other fields
3. Submit

Title: PAY-004: Expired Card
Steps:
1. Enter valid card
2. Enter expired date: 01/2020
3. Submit

Title: PAY-005: CVV Wrong Length
Steps:
1. Enter valid card
2. Enter CVV with wrong length (12 or 12345)
3. Submit

Title: SEC-001: Card Number Iframe Isolation
Steps:
1. Open DevTools
2. Inspect card number field
3. Verify iframe from testflex.cybersource.com
4. Try accessing via JavaScript
Expected Result: Field in secure iframe, cannot access value

Title: SEC-002: CVV Iframe Isolation
Steps:
1. Inspect CVV field
2. Verify iframe implementation
3. Attempt JavaScript access

Title: SEC-003: No Sensitive Data in Requests
Steps:
1. Open Network tab
2. Fill form with card data
3. Submit order
4. Inspect all requests
Expected Result: No raw card/CVV in requests, only tokens

Title: SEC-004: HTTPS Enforcement
Steps:
1. Check page URL
2. Check iframe sources
3. Check all API calls
